summary_en: 3,000,000 shares (1.75% of S/O) to be cancelled. Post-cancellation issued share count: 167,961,960 shares. Effective date: 2026-06-18.
title_en: Notice Regarding Cancellation of Treasury Shares
translation_en_brief: On 14 May 2026, the Board of Directors of Nihon Kohden Corporation resolved to cancel 3,000,000 treasury shares (representing 1.75% of issued shares outstanding) pursuant to Article 178 of the Companies Act. The cancellation is scheduled to take effect on 18 June 2026. Following the cancellation, the total number of issued shares will be 167,961,960.
